title: Fuzzy Wurm Crawler
move_pattern: Starts with First Acid Goop → Inhale → Acid Goop → Acid Goop → Inhale → (repeats Inhale/Acid Goop loop).
notes: After the opening Acid Goop, the monster Inhales (gaining 7 Strength and entering a puffed state visually), then loops between Acid Goop and Inhale. Both Acid Goop moves use the same effect.
